C

changeRegionDescription(RegionSVGPath) - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.RegionSelectController
Updates the region description UI based on the selected region
changeSceneToRegionReferendums(Region) - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.RegionSelectController
Changes the scene to the referendums view for the selected region
CheckLogin - Class in com.oop.referendumserver.services.dto
DTO (Data Transfer Object) representing the result of a login check operation Contains either an AppUser object representing a successfully logged-in user or a LoginErrorEnum representing an error encountered during the login process
CheckLogin(AppUser) - Constructor for class com.oop.referendumserver.services.dto.CheckLogin
Constructs a CheckLogin object with the provided AppUser.
CheckLogin(LoginErrorEnum) - Constructor for class com.oop.referendumserver.services.dto.CheckLogin
Constructs a CheckLogin object with the provided LoginErrorEnum.
cleanUp() - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.view.context.ViewContext
Resets the view context, clearing all stored data.

ConditionalReferendum - Class in com.oop.referendumserver.db.model
Represents a conditional referendum in the referendum system

ConditionalReferendumEvaluator - Class in com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators
An evaluator implementation for conditional referendums Evaluates the outcome of a conditional referendum based on collected referendum forms
